# Dialog

Styled dialog component family built on zw-dialog primitives.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/dialog</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">zweb add dialog</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Add

```bash
zweb add dialog
```

## Imports

Styled component:

```tsx
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogTrigger,
  DialogContent,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogClose,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog'
```

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogTrigger,
  DialogContent,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogClose,
} from '@zeus-web/dialog/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/dialog/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type      | Default | Description                  |
| ------------- | --------- | ------- | ---------------------------- |
| `open`        | `boolean` | -       | Controlled open state.       |
| `defaultOpen` | `boolean` | -       | Initial open state.          |
| `modal`       | `boolean` | `true`  | Whether the dialog is modal. |

## Events

| Event         | React prop     | Detail                              | Description                      |
| ------------- | -------------- | ----------------------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| `open-change` | `onOpenChange` | `open: boolean, nativeEvent: Event` | Emitted when open state changes. |

## Slots

| Slot      | Description              |
| --------- | ------------------------ |
| `default` | Dialog child components. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-background`
- `text-foreground`
- `ring-ring`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=dialog-content]`
- `[data-slot=dialog-title]`
- `[data-slot=dialog-description]`

## Registry

Type: `registry:ui`

Dependencies:

- `@zeus-web/dialog`
- `class-variance-authority`
- `clsx`
- `tailwind-merge`

Files:

- `default/lib/utils.ts` → `lib/utils.ts` (`registry:lib`)
- `default/dialog.tsx` → `components/ui/dialog.tsx` (`registry:ui`)

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Dialog, DialogTrigger and DialogContent together.
- Use DialogTitle for accessible titles.

Do not:

- Do not create a second overlay unless the registry provides one.
- Do not assume focus trap is complete in this MVP.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogTrigger,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'

export function Example() {
  return (
    <Dialog>
      <DialogTrigger>
        <Button>Open</Button>
      </DialogTrigger>
      <DialogContent>
        <DialogTitle>Title</DialogTitle>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  )
}
```
